detection.cv_note: GroupKFold by (model, dataset, seed); per-fold group z-score (train-only); grid search on fold-0 train with 3-fold inner CV; NaN preserved for XGBoost (union mode), 0-filled for LR/SVM/EasyEnsemble

categorization.cv_note: GroupKFold by (model, dataset, seed); per-fold group z-score (train-only); grid search on fold-0 train with 3-fold inner CV; NaN preserved for XGBoost (union mode), 0-filled for LR/SVM/EasyEnsemble

stable_rules_across_folds: abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q2 AND abs_loss <= Q0 AND abs_val_loss <= Q1 => output
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q2 AND abs_loss > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q3 => kv_cache
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q2 AND abs_loss > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q3 => positional
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q2 AND abs_loss <= Q0 AND abs_val_loss > Q1 => embedding
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity <= Q1 AND abs_loss <= Q3 AND abs_logit_conf <= Q3 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q3 => kv_cache
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q2 AND abs_loss > Q3 AND abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity <= Q3 => residual
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q2 AND abs_loss > Q3 AND abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q3 => output

edges.rule: abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q2 AND abs_loss <= Q0 AND abs_val_loss <= Q1 => output
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q2 AND abs_loss > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q3 => kv_cache
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q2 AND abs_loss > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q3 => positional
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q2 AND abs_loss <= Q0 AND abs_val_loss > Q1 => embedding
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity <= Q1 AND abs_loss <= Q3 AND abs_logit_conf <= Q3 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q3 => kv_cache
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q2 AND abs_loss > Q3 AND abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity <= Q3 => residual
abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q1 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q2 AND abs_loss > Q3 AND abs_val_cache_hidden_similarity > Q3 => output
